hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Break the exercise down into steps - get the laser moving from side to side first

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Track your position with a variable so you know where you are

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Keep track of which direction you're moving (left or right)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use boundaries to know when to turn around

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Check for aliens above before shooting

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The logic is similar to the rainbow ball exercise - you need to bounce back and forth
